Name: Git - Clone, copy, push
Description: Clones a repository, copies files from the `Source Path` to the `Destination Path` then commits to the repository.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Repo.Url
Parameters.Label: Git Repository URL
Parameters.HelpText: The URL used for the `git clone` operation.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.User.Name
Parameters.Label: Git Username
Parameters.HelpText: Username of the credentials to use to log into git.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Source.Path
Parameters.Label: Source Path
Parameters.HelpText: Relative path to the folder or items to copy.  This field can take wildcards, eg - `/MyPath/*`

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Destination.Path
Parameters.Label: Destination Path
Parameters.HelpText: Relative path to the folder to copy items to.  This is the folder name only.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Tag
Parameters.Label: Tag
Parameters.HelpText: **(Optional)** Checkout the code for `SourcePath` from a specific tag.
